title: 🔥资金虹吸效应显著
body: 市场处于存量博弈阶段。BTC.D 报 59.6%，尽管 7 日微跌 0.6%，但仍处于 2025 年中以来的高位区间。这表明资金继续集中在比特币，未向山寨币轮动。缺乏增量资金入场，整体市场结构依然偏紧，难以支撑全面行情。中性。风格切换何时开启？
body_en: The market is currently in a zero-sum game phase. BTC.D stands at 59.6%. Despite a slight 7-day dip of 0.6%, it remains in a high range not seen since mid-2025. This indicates capital continues to concentrate in Bitcoin, with no rotation into altcoins. Lacking fresh inflows, the overall market structure remains tight, making it difficult to sustain a broad-based rally. Neutral. When will the rotation begin?
